uplink.description: Status report, leak detected: water.leak true (report type 0x01)
uplink._note: TTN example input (deviceType 50, report type 0x01). Expected.data from running reference/upstream-codec.js (Volt 3, WaterLeak 'Leak'); mapped to battery 3.0 V and water.leak true.

uplink.description: Status report, dry (no leak): water.leak false (report type 0x01)
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds input (byte4 = 0 -> NoLeak). Expected.data from running reference/upstream-codec.js (Volt 3, WaterLeak 'NoLeak'); maps to water.leak false.

uplink.description: Low-battery flag set (high bit of voltage byte) surfaces lowBattery extra
uplink._note: Synthetic input: byte3 = 0x80 | 30 = 158. Upstream emits Volt '3(low battery)'; normalized to battery 3.0 + lowBattery true extra (verified against reference/upstream-codec.js).

uplink.description: Device-info / startup frame carries no measurement (report type 0x00)
uplink._note: TTN example input (report type 0x00). Upstream returns device/version metadata; we report no measurement.

uplink.description: Config response on fPort 7 is unsupported
uplink._note: TTN example input (ConfigReportRsp on fPort 7). Config frames carry no measurement; we report unsupported fPort.
